name: Twitter, Inc.
description: Twitter, Inc., now operating as X Corp., is a prominent American social media company headquartered in San Francisco, California. Originally founded as a microblogging platform, it allowed users to post and interact with short messages known as tweets. Following its acquisition by Elon Musk in 2022, the company underwent a significant rebranding to X, transforming into a broader platform that integrates social networking, multimedia content, and various digital services. It remains a central hub for global real-time communication, news dissemination, and public discourse, serving millions of users worldwide under its new identity.
